wiki.summary: “DYKILY” (an acronym for “Don’t You Know I Love You?”) is the fifteenth track from Joji's fourth studio album, Piss In The Wind. On 16 April 2019, DYKILY song was included on Joji’s VHS tape Lost Ballads. The song was additionally teased at the end of the music video for “Window”. Read more on Last.fm.
